title: Compute Huffman bit lengths from symbol frequencies
notes: After a heap has been built, compute the optimal bit length for each code. Symbols with higher frequencies get shorter codes. Handles overflow via the length-limited Huffman trick (reduce longest, increase next-longest). Writes results into desc.dyn_tree[i].len and state.bl_count[len]. Requires DeflateState fields: bl_count: Vec<u16>, heap: Vec<i32>, depth: Vec<u8>.

title: Construct an optimal Huffman tree from frequency data
notes: Given symbol frequencies in desc.dyn_tree[i].freq, construct an optimal Huffman tree via repeated min-heap extractions. Produces a tree where parent indices point to children. Writes desc.dyn_tree[i].len via gen_bitlen and desc.dyn_tree[i].code via gen_codes. Requires DeflateState fields: heap: Vec<i32>, heap_len: i32, heap_max: i32, depth: Vec<u8>, bl_count: Vec<u16>.

title: Refill the deflate sliding window with input data
notes: When lookahead is low, copy unread bytes from strm.next_in into state.window, slide window if needed (calls slide_hash), update head[] hash chain positions. Requires DeflateState fields: window: Vec<u8>, strstart: u32, lookahead: u32, wsize: u32, w_size: u32, block_start: i64.
